name: AppAnalyticsService
desc: The interface definition for application analytics tracking.

name: identifyUser
desc: Associates the current analytics session with a specific user id, email, and optional name.

name: navigatorObserver
desc: Returns the RouteObserver to track navigation events.

name: trackEvent
desc: Tracks a custom analytics event using the provided eventData.

name: trackNavigation
desc: Tracks a navigation event to the specified path with an optional widgetClass.

name: AppAnalyticsMockService
desc: A mock implementation of AppAnalyticsService for testing purposes.

name: identifyUser
desc: Associates the current analytics session with a specific user id, email, and optional name.

name: navigatorObserver
desc: Returns the RouteObserver to track navigation events.

name: trackEvent
desc: Tracks a custom analytics event using the provided eventData.

name: trackNavigation
desc: Tracks a navigation event to the specified path with an optional widgetClass.

name: AppAnalyticsData
desc:
Represents a structured analytics event containing an event type,
description, execution timestamp, and optional value.

name: AppAnalyticsMixin
desc:
A mixin that provides simplified access to the AppAnalyticsService
for tracking user events and navigation within any class.

name: analytics
desc: The injected instance of the analytics service.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: noSuchMethod
desc: Invoked when a nonexistent method or property is accessed.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: runtimeType
desc: A representation of the runtime type of the object.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: trackEvent
desc: Tracks a specific user event.

name: trackNavigation
desc: Tracks a screen or page navigation event to the given path.

name: AppConfig
desc: Base configuration interface that provides core application settings.

name: aboutUsUrl
desc: The URL endpoint for the about us page.

name: appId
desc: The unique identifier for the application (e.g., bundle ID or package name).

name: appName
desc: The localized or display name of the application.

name: baseUrl
desc: The base URL for network requests.

name: cipherIV
desc: The initialization vector (IV) used for crypto operations. Can be asynchronous.

name: cipherKey
desc: The cipher key used for crypto operations. Can be asynchronous.

name: countryCode
desc: The default country code for the application.

name: dbName
desc: The default database name used for local storage.

name: defaultLanguageCode
desc: The default language code (e.g., 'en', 'fr') for the application.

name: defaultLocale
desc: The default Locale used before any user preferences are applied.

name: isMock
desc: Indicates whether the app is running in a mocked/development environment.

name: privacyUrl
desc: The URL endpoint for the privacy policy page.

name: rsaPublicKeyPath
desc: The optional asset path to the RSA public key.

name: scheme
desc: The URL scheme for deep linking (e.g., myapp://).

name: strings
desc: A collection of localized strings used globally across the foundation.

name: supportUrl
desc: The URL endpoint for the support or help center page.

name: supportedLocales
desc: The list of Locales supported by the application.

name: termsOfUseUrl
desc: The URL endpoint for the terms of use page.

name: webAppHosts
desc: The list of allowed hosts for web app functionality.

name: windowSize
desc: The optional specific window size for desktop/web environments.

name: AppConfigStrings
desc: Defines localized or configurable strings used commonly across the framework.

name: AppConfigStrings.new
desc: Creates an AppConfigStrings instance containing localized validation and error messages.

name: amountMaximum
desc: Validation message for an amount above the maximum allowed.

name: amountMinimum
desc: Validation message for an amount below the minimum allowed.

name: anHourAgo
desc: Time ago formatting for an hour ago (e.g., 'An hour ago').

name: checkNetwork
desc: Error message prompting the user to check their network connection.

name: daysAgo
desc: Time ago formatting for days ago (e.g., '{} days ago').

name: daysOld
desc: Age formatting for days old.

name: fieldRequired
desc: Validation message for a required field.

name: fieldsDontMatch
desc: Validation message when matching fields do not match (e.g., passwords).

name: hoursAgo
desc: Time ago formatting for hours ago (e.g., '{} hours ago').

name: insufficentFunds
desc: Error message indicating insufficient funds.

name: invalidAmount
desc: Validation message for an invalid monetary amount.

name: invalidDate
desc: Validation message for an invalid date format.

name: invalidEmail
desc: Validation message for an invalid email format.

name: invalidNumber
desc: Validation message for an invalid generic number.

name: invalidPhone
desc: Validation message for an invalid phone number.

name: invalidUrl
desc: Validation message for an invalid URL format.

name: maxLength
desc: Validation message for maximum length.

name: minLength
desc: Validation message for minimum length.

name: minutes
desc: String representation for minutes (e.g., 'minutes').

name: minutesAgo
desc: Time ago formatting for minutes ago (e.g., '{} minutes ago').

name: momentsAgo
desc: Time ago formatting for moments ago (e.g., 'Moments ago').

name: monthsOld
desc: Age formatting for months old.

name: mustBeNYears
desc: Validation message requiring a minimum age.

name: noInternet
desc: Error message indicating no internet connection.

name: passwordMustHaveNChars
desc: Validation message for password minimum character constraint.

name: passwordRequired
desc: Validation message for a required password field.

name: provideValidEmail
desc: Validation message prompting for a valid email.

name: requestFailedUnexpectedly
desc: Error message for a generic unexpected failure.

name: seconds
desc: String representation for seconds (e.g., 'seconds').

name: weeksOld
desc: Age formatting for weeks old.

name: yearsOld
desc: Age formatting for years old.

name: yesterday
desc: Time formatting for yesterday.

name: AppCountryUtility
desc: A utility class for fetching and searching country data.

name: fetchCountries
desc: Fetches a list of countries from the local JSON asset.

name: searchCountries
desc: Searches for countries matching the given query.

name: AppDateUtil
desc: A utility class for safely comparing DateTime instances.

name: isAfterToday
desc: Returns true if date occurs strictly after the current local day.

name: isBeforeToday
desc: Returns true if date occurred strictly before the current local day.

name: isSameDay
desc: Returns true if both dates represent the exact same calendar day.

name: isSameMonth
desc: Returns true if both dates are in the same year and month.

name: isSameYear
desc: Returns true if both dates are in the same calendar year.

name: AppDebouncer
desc: A utility class that debounces rapidly firing events or function calls.

name: AppDebouncer.new
desc: Creates an AppDebouncer with the specified delay.

name: abort
desc: Cancels the currently scheduled action, if any.

name: delay
desc: The duration to wait before executing the action.

name: isActive
desc: Returns true if the debouncer is currently waiting to execute an action.

name: run
desc: Schedules the action to be run after the delay.

name: AppFilePlugin
desc: A plugin for handling file system operations such as picking and saving files.

name: getFileMimeType
desc:
Retrieves the MIME type of the given file.
Fallbacks to "image/*" if the document type is FsDocumentType.image and MIME lookup fails.

name: getMaxDuration
desc: Calculates the maximum duration allowed based on mimeType and user subscription tier.

name: getMaxSizeInMb
desc: Calculates the maximum allowed file size in MB based on mimeType and user subscription tier.

name: pickFile
desc:
Opens the device's native file picker to let the user select a file.
Validates file size against limits based on the user's tier.

name: saveFile
desc: Saves the provided bytes as a new file on the device with the given filename and ext.

name: AppValidators
desc:
Provides a comprehensive suite of static methods for validating form inputs
such as emails, passwords, dates, amounts, and custom regex patterns.

name: amountValidator
desc: Validates that value parses to a valid amount within minAmount and maxAmount.

name: balanceValidator
desc: Validates that the numeric value does not exceed the provided balance.

name: bvnValidator
desc: Validates the text matches the standard Nigerian BVN format.

name: cardExpiryValidator
desc: Validates the credit card expiry text is not in the past.

name: cardNumberValidator
desc: Validates the credit text (card number) format based on known card regex patterns.

name: cvvValidator
desc: Validates the credit card text (CVV) format.

name: dateValidator
desc: Validates a date string, optionally ensuring it is greater/less than otherDate.

name: digitValidator
desc: Validates that value parses successfully to a numeric digit.

name: dobValidator
desc: Validates that a parsed date meets the minAge requirement.

name: emailValidator
desc: Validates the email format using regex.

name: matchValidator
desc: Validates that base matches comparison.

name: maxLength
desc: Validates that text does not exceed the maximum length requirement.

name: minLength
desc: Validates that text meets the minimum length requirement.

name: nameValidator
desc: Validates that name is not empty.

name: nubanValidator
desc: Validates the text matches the standard Nigerian NUBAN format.

name: passwordValidator
desc: Validates a password ensuring it's not empty and meets the minLength requirement.

name: phoneValidator
desc: Validates the tel (phone number) format using regex.

name: required
desc: Validates that data is not empty.

name: requiredList
desc: Validates that the data list is not empty.

name: urlValidator
desc: Validates the url format using regex.

name: AppHelpers
desc:
A collection of miscellaneous helper functions including JSON parsing,
connection checking, file size calculation, and error extraction.

name: AppHttpMixin
desc:
A mixin that provides safe network request handling and error parsing
for repositories or services interacting with HTTP APIs.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: noSuchMethod
desc: Invoked when a nonexistent method or property is accessed.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: requestHandler
desc: Executes an asynchronous network func and returns a TaskResponse.

name: runtimeType
desc: A representation of the runtime type of the object.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: AppHttpModel
desc: Represents the configuration and state for the application's HTTP client.

name: AppHttpOverrides
desc: A custom HttpOverrides that bypasses SSL certificate validation.

name: createHttpClient
desc: Returns a new HttpClient using the given context.

name: AppHttpService
desc: An abstract service wrapper around Dio for executing HTTP requests.

name: attachInterceptor
desc: Attaches a single interceptor to the underlying HTTP client.

name: attachInterceptors
desc: Attaches a list of interceptors to the underlying HTTP client.

name: delete
desc: Executes a DELETE request to the specified path.

name: download
desc: Executes a GET request specifically intended for downloading data from the path.

name: generateFormData
desc: Generates a FormData object from the provided data map.

name: get
desc:
Executes a GET request to the specified path with optional query parameters,
custom request options, and a callback onReceiveProgress.

name: patch
desc: Executes a PATCH request to the specified path with an optional body.

name: post
desc: Executes a POST request to the specified path with an optional body.

name: postFile
desc: Executes a POST request optimized for file uploads via multipart/form-data to the specified path.

name: put
desc: Executes a PUT request to the specified path with an optional body.

name: AppImagePlugin
desc: A plugin specifically designed for picking image files from the file system.

name: pickImage
desc: Opens the device's native file picker configured specifically to select an image file.

name: AppLogger
desc: A simple logger wrapper that prints colored output only in debug mode.

name: info
desc: Logs an informational data message in green.

name: setTag
desc: Updates the default logging prefix tag.

name: severe
desc: Logs a severe/error message in red with optional stackTrace and error details.

name: AppPushNotificationService
desc: Defines the core interface for handling push notifications.

name: disableMessaging
desc: Disables the messaging service.

name: getInitialMessage
desc: Retrieves the initial message that caused the app to open from a terminated state.

name: initialiseMessaging
desc: Initializes the messaging service to start receiving notifications.

name: token
desc: The device-specific token for push notifications.

name: unwatchTopic
desc: Unsubscribes the device from the specified topic.

name: watchTopic
desc: Subscribes the device to the specified topic.

name: AppFcmMockService
desc: A mock implementation of AppPushNotificationService for testing.

name: disableMessaging
desc: Disables the messaging service.

name: getInitialMessage
desc: Retrieves the initial message that caused the app to open from a terminated state.

name: initialiseMessaging
desc: Initializes the messaging service to start receiving notifications.

name: token
desc: The device-specific token for push notifications.

name: unwatchTopic
desc: Unsubscribes the device from the specified topic.

name: watchTopic
desc: Subscribes the device to the specified topic.

name: AppSessionService
desc: Defines the interface for managing user sessions, including token lifecycle and biometric states.

name: accessToken
desc: Retrieves the active access token.

name: allowsBiometricAuth
desc: Checks if biometric authentication is enabled and allowed for this session.

name: clearSessionData
desc: Clears all session data permanently.

name: closeSession
desc: Closes the active session, typically used on logout.

name: createSession
desc: Creates a new session with the provided authData.

name: deviceId
desc: Retrieves the unique device identifier.

name: deviceToken
desc: Retrieves the device token used for push notifications and biometrics.

name: disableBioLogin
desc: Disables biometric login capabilities for the current user.

name: enableBioLogin
desc: Enables biometric login capabilities, requiring a deviceToken.

name: hasSession
desc: Checks if any session data exists.

name: hasToken
desc: Checks if a token is present in the session.

name: isExpired
desc: Checks if the current session token has expired.

name: isLoggedIn
desc: Checks if the user is currently logged in with a valid session.

name: lastEmail
desc: Retrieves the last email address used to log in.

name: modifySession
desc: Modifies the existing session with update. If ephemeral is true, the changes won't persist across restarts.

name: refreshToken
desc: Retrieves the refresh token to renew the session.

name: sessionData
desc: Retrieves the current session data, if any.

name: shouldBeRefreshed
desc: Checks if the current session token is nearing expiration and needs refreshing.

name: AppSharePlugin
desc: A plugin for sharing text and files using the share_plus package.

name: shareFile
desc:
Shares file data to the device's native share sheet.
You can optionally provide a title, a fileName (default: transcribr_file),
and a mimeType (default: application/pdf).

name: shareText
desc:
Shares a simple text snippet to the device's native share sheet.
An optional title can be provided for email subjects or similar contexts.

name: AppTaskMixin
desc:
A mixin that provides safe execution wrappers for tasks and automatic
crash reporting for unexpected errors.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: noSuchMethod
desc: Invoked when a nonexistent method or property is accessed.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: runThrowableTask
desc: Executes a synchronous func safely, catching and reporting any exceptions.

name: runtimeType
desc: A representation of the runtime type of the object.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: tryRunThrowableTask
desc: Attempts to run func safely, returning null if an exception is thrown.

name: AppAmountFormatter
desc: A TextInputFormatter that automatically formats the input as a number with commas.

name: formatEditUpdate
desc: Called when text is being typed or cut/copy/pasted in the EditableText.

name: AppCardDateFormatter
desc: A TextInputFormatter that automatically formats the input as a card expiry date (MM/YY).

name: formatEditUpdate
desc: Called when text is being typed or cut/copy/pasted in the EditableText.

name: AppCardInputFormatter
desc: A TextInputFormatter that automatically formats the input as a grouped credit card number.

name: formatEditUpdate
desc: Called when text is being typed or cut/copy/pasted in the EditableText.

name: AppPhoneNumberFormatter
desc: A TextInputFormatter that automatically formats the input as a phone number.

name: formatEditUpdate
desc: Called when text is being typed or cut/copy/pasted in the EditableText.

name: AppTextFormatter
desc:
A centralized utility class for formatting text, numbers, currencies, dates,
and phone numbers according to the app's locale and configuration settings.

name: age
desc: Returns a localized, human-readable age string representing the time elapsed since datetime.

name: formatCardExpiry
desc: Formats the given value into a standard card expiry format (MM/YY).

name: formatCardNumber
desc: Formats the given value into grouped blocks representing a credit card number.

name: formatCurrency
desc: Returns a fully formatted currency string with comma separators.

name: formatCurrencyShort
desc: Returns a short, compact formatted currency string (e.g., "1.5K").

name: formatDate
desc: Parses and formats the given date string using the specified format or fallback.

name: formatNumber
desc: Returns a short, compact formatted number string without currency symbol.

name: formatNumberCutsom
desc: Formats the numeric amount using a custom formatting pattern.

name: formatNumberLong
desc: Returns a fully formatted number string with comma separators.

name: formatPhone
desc: Formats the given tel string as a standardized phone number layout.

name: formatSalaryRange
desc: Returns a formatted string representing a salary range.

name: formatSalaryRangeShort
desc: Returns a compact formatted string representing a salary range.

name: maskedCurrency
desc: Returns a masked string representation of a currency value (e.g., "$*****").

name: timeSince
desc: Returns a localized string representing the time elapsed since date compared to comparisonDate.

name: AppEquatable
desc: An alias for Equatable to abstract the underlying implementation.

name: AppSearchDelegate
desc: Signature for a delegate function that performs a search and returns type T.

name: FunctionCall
desc: Signature for a synchronous operation returning type T.

name: FutureCall
desc: Signature for an asynchronous operation returning type T.

name: ItemBuilder
desc: Signature for a builder that creates a Widget based on an index.

name: MapCallback
desc: Signature for a callback that maps an item of type T to type E.

name: OnBoolValidation
desc: Signature for a validation callback that returns a boolean indicating validity.

name: OnChanged
desc: Signature for a generic callback triggered when a value of type T changes.

name: OnChanged2
desc: Signature for a generic callback triggered when two values change.

name: OnChangedAsync
desc: Signature for an asynchronous callback triggered when a value of type T changes.

name: OnDynamicRoute
desc: Signature for a callback that generates a dynamic route from RouteSettings.

name: OnNavigate
desc: Signature for a navigation callback invoked with a route name, optional context, and arguments.

name: OnPressed
desc: Signature for a standard synchronous callback with no arguments.

name: OnPressedAsync
desc: Signature for an asynchronous callback with no arguments.

name: OnValidate
desc: Signature for a validation callback that returns an error string, or null if valid.

name: TaskCallResponse
desc: Signature for an asynchronous task that returns a TaskResponse of type T.

name: TaskCallWithInput
desc: Signature for an asynchronous task that takes input K and returns TaskResponse of T.

name: TaskNotifier
desc:
A ValueNotifier that holds a Future resulting in a TaskResponse of type T.
Useful for tracking asynchronous operations and their loading/error states.

name: TransformCall
desc: Signature for a function that transforms dynamic input into a value of type T.

name: Tuple2
desc: A tuple containing two values of types T and K.

name: ValueBuilder
desc: Signature for a builder that creates a Widget from a value of type T.

name: ValueBuilder2
desc: Signature for a builder that creates a Widget from two generic values.

name: ValueFormatter
desc: Signature for a function that formats a numeric value into a string.

name: AppUrlHandler
desc: A utility class for handling URL launching operations.

name: openUrl
desc: Opens the given url in the device's default browser or associated application.

name: BiometricAuthService
desc: The interface definition for biometric authentication services.

name: authenticate
desc:
Authenticates the user with biometrics, displaying the provided title.
Returns true if authentication is successful, false otherwise.

name: hasBioCapabilities
desc: Checks whether the device supports and has biometric capabilities enabled.

name: BiometricAuthServiceImpl
desc:
The standard implementation of BiometricAuthService utilizing the
local_auth package for device-level biometrics.

name: BiometricAuthServiceImpl.new
desc: Creates a new instance of BiometricAuthServiceImpl.

name: authenticate
desc:
Authenticates the user with biometrics, displaying the provided title.
Returns true if authentication is successful, false otherwise.

name: hasBioCapabilities
desc: Checks whether the device supports and has biometric capabilities enabled.

name: BiometricAuthServiceMock
desc: A mock implementation of BiometricAuthService for testing environments.

name: authenticate
desc:
Authenticates the user with biometrics, displaying the provided title.
Returns true if authentication is successful, false otherwise.

name: hasBioCapabilities
desc: Checks whether the device supports and has biometric capabilities enabled.

name: BuildContextExtension
desc: Extension on BuildContext providing UI utilities, localization access, and device info.

name: copyTextToClipboard
desc: Copies the provided value to the system clipboard.

name: currentLocale
desc: Returns the current active Locale.

name: currentLocaleString
desc: Returns the string representation of the current active locale (e.g., "en_US").

name: getClipboardText
desc: Asynchronously retrieves the current plain text from the system clipboard.

name: isAndroid
desc: Returns true if the current platform is Android.

name: isFucshia
desc: Returns true if the current platform is Fuchsia.

name: isIos
desc: Returns true if the current platform is iOS.

name: isLinux
desc: Returns true if the current platform is Linux.

name: isMacos
desc: Returns true if the current platform is macOS.

name: isWindows
desc: Returns true if the current platform is Windows.

name: launchUrl
desc: Launches a URL using the foundation's central AppUrlHandler.

name: locales
desc: Returns the list of locales supported by the application.

name: makeVisible
desc: Scrolls the closest scrollable to ensure the widget associated with this context is visible.

name: requestFocus
desc: Requests focus for the specified node within this context's scope.

name: resetFocus
desc: Resets the current focus scope to an empty, unfocused node.

name: scrollState
desc: Returns the closest ScrollableState ancestor, if any.

name: shareFile
desc: Shares a file via the native share dialog using Uint8List raw data.

name: shareText
desc: Shares a plain text using the native share dialog.

name: updateLocale
desc: Updates the application's locale both in easy_localization and foundation config.

name: ChangeModel
desc: A model that manages undo and redo functionality for a list of Identifiable objects.

name: clear
desc: Clears all changes and returns a new empty ChangeModel.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: makeBatchChanges
desc: Records multiple changes at once.

name: makeChange
desc: Records a change from current state to a new change state.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: redo
desc: Reapplies the last reverted set of changes.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: undo
desc: Reverts the last set of changes.

name: ChangeStack
desc: A simple stack data structure for tracking changes.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: peek
desc: Returns the top member of the stack without removing it.

name: pop
desc: Removes and returns the top member of the stack.

name: push
desc: Pushes a new member onto the stack.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: Codable
desc: Base class for all model objects that can be serialized to JSON.

name: ColorExtension
desc: Extensions on Color providing opacity, brightness, and CSS hex conversions.

name: colorSet
desc: Returns a ColorSet derived from the current color's value.

name: isBright
desc: A color is considered bright if its luminance is greater than 0.5.

name: setOpacity
desc: Sets the opacity of the color.

name: toCssHex
desc: Converts a Flutter Color to a CSS hex string.

name: ColorSet
desc: A custom Color subclass that manages a light and dark theme pair.

name: colorSpace
desc: The color space of this color.

name: ContentTypeInterceptor
desc: An interceptor that automatically attaches the appropriate Content-Type header based on the request data format.

name: ContentTypeInterceptor.new
desc: Creates a new instance of ContentTypeInterceptor.

name: onRequest
desc: Called when the request is about to be sent.

name: Country
desc: A model class representing a country and its metadata (e.g., dial code, ISO code, flags).

name: props
desc:
The list of properties that will be used to determine whether
two instances are equal.

name: AppCrashlyticsService
desc: The interface definition for crash reporting and error tracking services.

name: identifyUser
desc: Associates subsequent crash reports with a specific user id, email, and optional name.

name: init
desc: Initializes the crashlytics service.

name: trackError

desc: Tracks a non-fatal or fatal error with a message, optional error object, and trace.

name: AppCryptoMode
desc: Defines the supported cryptographic encoding modes.

name: isBase16
desc: Returns true if this mode is base16.

name: isBase64
desc: Returns true if this mode is base64.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: DecryptInterceptor
desc: An interceptor that intercepts incoming responses and decrypts the body data using AppCryptoService.

name: DecryptInterceptor.new
desc: Creates a new instance of DecryptInterceptor.

name: onResponse
desc: Called when the response is about to be resolved.

desc: An interceptor that intercepts outgoing requests and encrypts the body data using AppCryptoService.

name: EncryptInterceptor.new
desc: Creates a new instance of EncryptInterceptor.

name: onRequest
desc: Called when the request is about to be sent.

name: AppCryptoService
desc: Defines the interface for cryptographic operations (encryption/decryption).

name: decrypt
desc: Decrypts the provided data using the specified mode (defaults to Base16).

name: encrypt
desc: Encrypts the provided data using the specified mode (defaults to Base16).

name: encryptRsa
desc: Encrypts the provided data using RSA algorithm and specified mode.

name: AppCryptoServiceImpl
desc: The standard implementation of AppCryptoService using AES and RSA algorithms.

name: AppCryptoServiceImpl.new
desc: Initializes the service with aesKey, aesVector, and an optional rsaPublicKeyPath.

name: aesKey
desc: The symmetric key used for AES encryption.

name: aesVector
desc: The initialization vector (IV) used for AES encryption.

name: decrypt
desc: Decrypts the provided data using the specified mode (defaults to Base16).

name: encrypt
desc: Encrypts the provided data using the specified mode (defaults to Base16).

name: encryptRsa
desc: Encrypts the provided data using RSA algorithm and specified mode.

name: rsaPublicKeyPath
desc: Optional file path to the RSA public key for asymmetric encryption.

name: AppCryptoServiceMock
desc: A mock implementation of AppCryptoService that uses Base64 encoding.

name: decrypt
desc: Decrypts the provided data using the specified mode (defaults to Base16).

name: encrypt
desc: Encrypts the provided data using the specified mode (defaults to Base16).

name: encryptRsa
desc: Encrypts the provided data using RSA algorithm and specified mode.

name: DateExtension
desc:
Extension on DateTime providing operators and utility methods for
date comparisons and formatting.

name: asAge
desc: Returns a human-readable string representing the age based on this date.

name: asDuration
desc: Returns a relative human-readable string indicating the time elapsed since this date.

name: asTimedDuration
desc: Returns a relative string indicating the time elapsed, explicitly including time components.

name: endOfDay
desc: Returns a new DateTime instance representing the end of this date's day (23:59:59).

name: format
desc: Formats this date as a string. Optionally accepts a custom date format.

name: isAfterToday
desc: Returns true if this date is strictly after the current date (ignoring time).

name: isBeforeToday
desc: Returns true if this date is strictly before the current date (ignoring time).

name: isSameDay
desc: Returns true if this date represents the same day as other, ignoring time.

name: isSameMonth
desc: Returns true if this date is in the same month and year as other.

name: isSameYear
desc: Returns true if this date is in the same year as other.

name: months
desc: Returns a list of month indices from 1 to 12.

name: operator <
desc: Returns true if this date is strictly before other.

name: operator <=
desc: Returns true if this date is before or equal to other.

name: operator >
desc: Returns true if this date is strictly after other.

name: operator >=
desc: Returns true if this date is after or equal to other.

name: startOfDay
desc: Returns a new DateTime instance representing the start of this date's day (00:00:00).

name: DateRangeExtension
desc: Extension on DateTimeRange providing utility methods for date ranges.

name: formattedDateRange
desc: Formats the start and end dates as a concatenated string range.

name: isLessThanAYear
desc: Returns true if the duration between start and end is one year or less.

name: DurationExtensions
desc: Extension on Duration providing getters for converting duration into larger time units.

name: inMonths
desc: Converts the duration into the ceiling number of months.

name: inPreciseYears
desc: Converts the duration into a precise floating-point number of years.

name: inWeeks
desc: Converts the duration into the ceiling number of weeks.

name: inYears
desc: Converts the duration into an integer number of years (approximated as 365 days).

name: TimeExtension
desc: Extension on TimeOfDay providing comparison operators and formatting methods.

name: asDate
desc: Converts this TimeOfDay into a DateTime instance using today's date.

name: formattedTime
desc: Formats this time as a string. Defaults to "hh:mm a".

name: isSameHour
desc: Returns true if this time shares the same hour as other.

name: isSameMinute
desc: Returns true if this time shares the same minute as other.

name: operator >
desc: Returns true if this time is strictly after other.

name: operator >=
desc: Returns true if this time is after or equal to other.

name: EnumExtensions

name: label
desc: Returns the string representation of the enum value, stripping the class name.

desc: Creates a new instance of JwtInterceptor.

name: onError
desc: Called when an exception was occurred during the request.

name: onRenew
desc: Callback executed when the token requires renewal before it expires.

name: onRequest
desc: Called when the request is about to be sent.

name: IterableExtension
desc: Extensions on nullable Iterable for safer data manipulation.

name: equals
desc: Compares this iterable with other for equality.

name: hasValue
desc: Returns true if the iterable is not null and not empty.

name: mapList
desc: Maps the elements of this iterable to a List using the toElement function safely.

name: tryFirst
desc: Returns the first element of the iterable, or null if it is empty or an error occurs.

name: tryFirstWhere
desc: Returns the first element matching the onValidate condition, or null if none match or an error occurs.

name: tryLast
desc: Returns the last element of the iterable, or null if it is empty or an error occurs.

name: tryLastWhere
desc: Returns the last element matching the onValidate condition, or null if none match or an error occurs.

name: whereList
desc: Filters the elements of this iterable to a List using the onValidate function safely.

name: ListExtension
desc: Extensions on nullable List for safer data manipulation.

name: addOrReplace
desc: Adds an item to the list, replacing it if it already exists.

name: addUnique
desc: Adds an item to the end of the list if it doesn't already exist.

name: intersperse
desc: Inserts interspersend between each element of the list.

name: random
desc: Returns a random element from the list, or null if it is empty or an error occurs.

name: tryAdd
desc: Tries to add an object to the list, catching any potential errors.

name: tryIndexWhere
desc: Returns the index of the first element matching onValidate, or -1 if not found or an error occurs.

name: unshiftOrReplace
desc: Adds an item to the beginning of the list, replacing it if it already exists.

name: unshiftUnique
desc: Adds an item to the beginning of the list if it doesn't already exist.

name: value
desc: Returns the list if it's not null, otherwise returns an empty list.

name: NonNullListExtension
desc: Extensions on non-nullable List for data manipulation.

name: intersperse
desc: Inserts interspersend between each element of the list.

name: IntExtension
desc: Extension on int providing specific time and date helpers.

name: asHourName
desc: Returns the formatted hour name treating this int as an hour (0-23).

name: asMinuteName
desc: Returns the formatted minute name treating this int as a minute (0-59).

name: monthDays
desc: Returns a list of day numbers (1 to N) based on this int representing a month index (1-12).

name: NumExtension
desc: Extension on num providing utilities for currency, formatting, and duration conversions.

name: asCents
desc: Converts a dollar value to cents (multiplies by 100).

name: asCurrency
desc: Formats this number as a currency string with a custom symbol.

name: asCurrencyShort
desc: Formats this number as a short currency string, abbreviating large values (e.g., "$1k").

name: asDeg
desc: Converts this number from radians to degrees.

name: asDollars
desc: Converts a cent value to dollars (divides by 100).

name: asDurationString
desc: Returns a raw duration string in "HH:MM:SS" or "MM:SS" format (treated as seconds).

name: asPercentage
desc: Returns a string representation of this number as a percentage (treats number as decimal).

name: days
desc: Returns a Duration treating this number as days.

name: formattedCurrency
desc: Formats this number as a standard currency string (e.g., "$1,000.00").

name: formattedDuration
desc: Returns a localized, human-readable duration string for this number (treated as seconds).

name: formattedNumber
desc: Formats this number with comma separators (e.g., "1,000").

name: formattedNumberLong
desc: Formats this number into a long number string without abbreviation.

name: hours
desc: Returns a Duration treating this number as hours.

name: maskedCurrency
desc: Formats this number as a masked currency string (e.g., "****").

name: microseconds
desc: Returns a Duration treating this number as microseconds.

name: milliseconds
desc: Returns a Duration treating this number as milliseconds.

name: minutes
desc: Returns a Duration treating this number as minutes.

name: seconds
desc: Returns a Duration treating this number as seconds.

name: timeCode
desc: Returns a time code string "HH:MM:SS" or "MM:SS" based on this number (treated as seconds).

name: randomInt
desc: Generates a random integer between 0 and 9999.

name: ObjectExtension
desc:
Extension on Object that provides global getters for accessing
the main configuration and localized strings.

name: config
desc: Provides quick access to the injected AppConfig instance.

name: stringKeys
desc: Provides quick access to the AppConfigStrings from the config.

name: isPermissionGranted
desc: Checks whether the specified permission is currently granted.

name: openAppPermissionsSettings
desc: Opens the device settings page for the application permissions.

name: requestPermission
desc:
Requests the specified permission from the user.
Returns true if granted.

name: requestPermissions

Requests a list of permissions from the user.
Returns true if all are granted.

name: isPermissionGranted

name: openAppPermissionsSettings

name: requestPermission
desc: Requests the given permissions.

name: isPermissionGranted

Requests the specified permission from the user.

Requests a list of permissions from the user.

desc: The hash code for this object.

name: captureLongScreen
desc:
Captures a long screenshot by scrolling through the provided scrollController.
Useful for capturing scrollable content like lists or forms.

name: captureScreen
desc:
Captures a screenshot of the widget currently associated with screenShotKey.
Returns the image data as a PNG-encoded Uint8List.

name: screenShotKey
desc: Global key used to identify the widget boundary to capture.

name: SessionData
desc: Holds session information for an authenticated user.

name: HttpSnapshotExtension
desc:
Extension specifically on AsyncSnapshot holding a TaskResponse to quickly
determine success or failure states.

name: hasFailure
desc: Returns true if the snapshot resulted in an error or a failed TaskResponse.

name: hasResponse
desc: Returns true if the snapshot successfully loaded with a valid response payload.

name: SnapshotExtension
desc: Extension on AsyncSnapshot providing convenience getters for stream/future states.

name: isEmpty
desc: Returns true if the snapshot has no data, or if its iterable data is empty.

name: isLoaded
desc: Returns true if the snapshot has finished loading with data and no errors.

name: isLoading
desc: Returns true if the connection state is currently waiting.

name: StateModel
desc: A foundational state class that provides a standardized loading flag for ViewModels.

name: NullableStringExtension
desc: Extension on nullable String for safer validation and manipulation.

name: accronym
desc: Returns the acronym parsed from the string.

name: directionality
desc: Returns the appropriate TextDirection based on the string content.

name: equals
desc: Case-insensitive equality check handling nullability gracefully.

name: hasValue
desc: Returns true if the string is non-null and not purely whitespace.

name: initials
desc: Returns the initials parsed from the string (e.g., "John Doe" -> "JD").

name: isRTL
desc: Checks if the text matches a Right-to-Left (RTL) script format.

name: value
desc: Returns the trimmed string, or an empty string if null.

name: StringExtension
desc: Extension on String providing localization, parsing, and formatting utilities.

name: asAmount
desc: Attempts to extract a numeric currency/amount value from this string.

name: asCardNumber
desc: Formats this string into a masked or spaced credit card number layout.

name: asDate
desc: Attempts to parse this string into a DateTime object.

name: asDuration
desc: Formats this string (assumed to be a duration) into a human-readable duration string.

name: asFormattedDate
desc: Parses and formats this string as a date using the provided format and fallback.

name: asFormattedNumber
desc: Formats this string (assumed to be a number) into a comma-separated number string.

name: asFormattedPhone
desc: Returns this string formatted as a standard phone number.

name: asInt
desc: Attempts to parse this string into an integer.

name: capitalise
desc: Capitalizes the first letter of the string (or each word if onlyFirst is false).

name: concatenate
desc: Appends other to this string, optionally separated by a concatenant.

name: ctr
desc: Translates this string and capitalizes the first letter of each word.

name: encoded
desc: Encodes this string into a UTF-8 Uint8List.

name: equals
desc: Case-insensitive equality check. Returns true if this string equals other.

name: fromCardExpiryTextToDate
desc: Parses a card expiry string like "12/25" into a DateTime object.

name: includes
desc: Case-insensitive inclusion check. Returns true if this string contains other.

name: isoDateOnly
desc: Returns only the date portion (YYYY-MM-DD) assuming an ISO 8601 formatted string.

name: isoTimeOnly
desc: Returns only the time portion assuming an ISO 8601 formatted string.

name: lastChars
desc: Returns the last 4 characters of the string (or the entire string if shorter than 4).

name: lower
desc: Shorthand for toLowerCase.

name: ltr
desc: Translates this string and converts it entirely to lowercase.

name: matches
desc: Exact case-insensitive match check. Alias for equals but without trimming.

name: obscuredEmail
desc: Partially obscures an email address (e.g., test@example.com -> te**@example.com).

name: toId
desc: Attempts to parse this string into an integer ID, returning the string itself if it fails.

name: toList
desc: Splits the string by a Pattern and attempts to transform each item into type T.

name: tr
desc: Translates this string using easy_localization. Accepts optional named arguments.

name: upper
desc: Shorthand for toUpperCase.

name: utr
desc: Translates this string and converts it entirely to uppercase.

name: withoutWhiteSpaceAndSpecialChar
desc: Strips all whitespace and non-alphanumeric special characters from the string.

name: randomNumString
desc: Generates a random numeric string.

name: AppStrings
desc:
Defines standard string constants used across the application,
such as currency symbols and bullet points.

name: NotifierExtension
desc: Extension on ValueNotifier to check for null values.

name: hasValue
desc: Returns true if the notifier's value is not null.

name: TextCtrlExtension
desc: Extension on TextEditingController providing convenience getters for text state.

name: hasValue
desc: Returns true if the controller contains non-empty, non-blank text.

name: textValue
desc: Returns the current text, or null if the text is empty or blank.

name: UsecaseModel
desc: Base interface for defining callable use cases within the application layer.

name: WidgetExtensions
desc: Extension on Widget providing context-free utilities.

name: launchUrl
desc: Launches the provided url using the central AppUrlHandler.

name: WidgetStateExtensions
desc: Extension on State providing UI and navigational utilities bound to widget state.

name: launchUrl
desc: Launches the provided url using the central AppUrlHandler.

desc: Dynamically sets the SystemUiOverlayStyle for the system chrome.
